case_title: STEVE LOWE VS. CROWN ENERGY SERVICES, INC. DBA

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOWE, STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT CROWN ENERGY SERVICES, INC. DBA ABLE SERVICES
